reference_librarian_queries.query: Scoped lessons and scheduling knowledge for assignment-agent creating execution schedule for change 5035632.
reference_librarian_queries.used_in: Informed conservative serial scheduling, risk ordering, output artifact requirements, and applied_lessons handling.

scheduling_decisions: Scheduled UOW-001/T1 first to establish the dirty-state/menu interception contract.
Scheduled UOW-002/T2 second as the high-risk shared implementation after the contract.
Scheduled UOW-003/T3 and UOW-004/T4 sequentially despite both depending only on T2 because their likely shared files and test harnesses make parallel execution unsafe.
Scheduled UOW-005/T5 last because tasks.yaml depends it on both T3 and T4.

risk_assessment.risk: Contract ambiguity could block or misdirect all downstream implementation.
risk_assessment.mitigation: Place first and require reuse of existing dirty-state and Order Changed modal paths.

risk_assessment.risk: Shared menu interception could regress clean-page menu navigation or existing pending-change behavior.
risk_assessment.mitigation: Place early after T1 and keep destination-specific work dependent on it.

risk_assessment.risk: Triage Worklist route/menu configuration may need narrow handling.
risk_assessment.mitigation: Validate after generic behavior exists and before app-level regression coverage.

risk_assessment.risk: Specimen Accessioning app-shell destination may expose routing-specific issues.
risk_assessment.mitigation: Validate after generic behavior exists and before app-level regression coverage.

risk_assessment.risk: E2E regression work could be blocked by incomplete destination-specific behavior.
risk_assessment.mitigation: Place last after both destination tasks complete.

decisions_made.decision: Use five sequential batches with no parallel execution.
decisions_made.rationale: The dependency graph and likely shared menu/header/test files favor safe serial execution over speculative parallelism.

decisions_made.decision: Include UOW-005 even though librarian summary referenced T1 through T4.
decisions_made.rationale: tasks.yaml is the authoritative assignment input and includes T5 with dependencies on T3 and T4.

issues_encountered.issue: Librarian guidance summarized a T1->T4 sequence while tasks.yaml contains T1 through T5.
issues_encountered.resolution: Scheduled all tasks.yaml tasks and documented the mismatch as a tool anomaly/knowledge gap.

notes: No source code, environment files, or target repository files were modified. No assignment-stage lessons applied.
